title: Allies Join the Rescue
description: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Nico Nico Robin, Zoro. The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: When you meet up with Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Does Nico Robin... Hate us now...

summary: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
